outcome_summary: S-0121 ran the cadence-fired project health-check audit (OVERDUE by 4; second formal exercise of ADR 0057 adversarial stance). Operative diagnostic was pre-loaded by user pushback at plan entry — 'STATE.md is becoming a junk drawer again; where else is this happening?' — instantiated as the structural pattern AI-default additive prose authorship in governed documents when the four-layer trace system per ADR 0036 (ADRs / ENGINE_LOG / MemPalace / git) already carries the content. Inline cleanups landed (per ADR 0057 user-buffered-execution carve-out for user-directed fix-in-context items): STATE.md 49,347 → 1,246 tokens (97% reduction; 37 prior-session rows retired; new scope-discipline blockquote); HANDOFF.md 278 → 13 lines (8 resolved sections pruned, every cross-reference verified extant; new prune-on-resolve discipline). Broader pattern surfaced as 4 adversarial recommendations routed through User adjudication: (a) ADR Consequences inline-amendment pattern in 8 ADRs + 3 recommended validator soft-warns to mechanize discipline; (b) validator runtime '< 500ms' target stale post-Phase-4 live-DB graph audit, tiered replacement recommended; (c) scan_orphans.py 'ops-doc-uncited' axis itself stats-as-proxy-for-function with false-positives for foundational ops docs, refinement recommended; (d) empty_declared_scope soft-warn over-fires on interactive sessions, mode-gate recommended. Five freshness probes confirmed structural health: MemPalace recall returned semantically tight content; validator acted-on rate 0% on persistent categories (known-deferred-with-annotation); Supabase DB clean (380 nodes / 536 edges / historical_influence=0 / evidence=0); 5 hook logs 0 failures across 414 entries; registry capture rates appropriate per register-purpose. Three non-obvious findings: (A) junk-drawer-prose accumulation as structural AI-authorship default; (B) scanner's ops-doc-uncited axis is stats-as-proxy; (C) routine-mode batch sessions produce near-zero substantive pushback/lesson capture. Cold-context probe on ADR 0035 surfaced user-local plan path in See-also as cold-read failure. Forward-fit map populated for closeout / OQ-DEC1 / Phase 6 / 7 / 8-9; routine-mode apparatus forward role is open until Phase 6 master plan. Cadence calibration: keep at 20 with documentation amendment noting routine-batch skew. Audit report at docs/health-checks/S-0121.md (328 lines / 17.6K tokens); User adjudication subsection blank on arrival per ADR 0057. Next session: S-0122 production-audit closeout (deferred from S-0121 per cadence pivot). Validator at shutdown: 0 hard-fails; soft-warns held at expected baseline minus health_check_overdue (cleared by last_audit_session bump). Four commits: eager-claim, STATE.md trim, HANDOFF.md prune, audit report. Plus this close commit.
